query:
-- First, get the Foundation membership package ID
SELECT id FROM membershipPackages WHERE name = 'Foundation' LIMIT 1;

-- Insert test enrollment for user ID 1 (Vincent Holmes)
INSERT INTO enrollments (
  membershipPackageId,
  customerName,
  customerEmail,
  customerPhone,
  stripeCustomerId,
  stripeSubscriptionId,
  downPaymentAmount,
  paidFirstMonth,
  remainingBalance,
  monthlyPaymentsRemaining,
  status,
  startDate,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
) VALUES (
  1, -- Foundation package
  'Vincent Holmes',
  'sensei30002003@gmail.com',
  '2818189288',
  'cus_test_123456',
  'sub_test_123456',
  99.00,
  1,
  0.00,
  0,
  'active',
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
